generated_oml:
instance DS18S20HighPrecisionSensorA : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20HighPrecisionSensorB : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20HighPrecisionSensorC : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20HighPrecisionSensorA, DS18S20HighPrecisionSensorB, DS18S20HighPrecisionSensorC
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from three DS18S20 sensors via 1-Wire bus"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQEnabler, ScipyEnabler, OneWireProtocolEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 2 parameters assuming uniform temperature and no heatbed heat accumulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 4 parameters accounting for heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for transmitting sensor data to DT controller"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance ScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance OneWireProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire communication protocol for sensor data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214×214×3 mm) controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO using MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB for 4A current actuation"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan (0.02 m³/s airflow) controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO using MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB for 4A current actuation"
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system management and actuation"
]

instance PCBWithMOSFETsOptocouplers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for handling 4A current in actuation circuits"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predicts temperature using thermal models for safety and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibrates thermal models using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterEstimationInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors system for safety and optimal operation via fault detection and state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, OptimalOperationInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values for system optimization"
]

instance ParameterEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated model parameters from sensor data"
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection and safety status of the thermal incubator"
]

instance OptimalOperationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal operational parameters for the incubator"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system consisting of a styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume), heatbed, fan, three DS18S20 sensors, Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, DS18S20HighPrecisionSensorA, DS18S20HighPrecisionSensorB, DS18S20HighPrecisionSensorC, RaspberryPi4ModelB, PCBWithMOSFETsOptocouplers, PowerSupply
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan control) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which translates them into hardware signals using MOSFETs and optocouplers."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via RabbitMQ server facilitating communication between physical components (PT) and software components (controller, low-level driver, simulation models) as depicted in Figure 7 of the document."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the 'as operated' phase, as it is integrated after system deployment for ongoing monitoring and prediction of the physical system's behavior."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validated through experiments testing assumptions (e.g., sensor placement for uniformity), calibration minimizing residual error via Scipy, with Model B showing improved prediction of thermal inertia compared to Model A."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker used for data exchange between PT and DT components, with all communication handled via message queues."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All software components (RabbitMQ, controller, driver) deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety; optocouplers used for electrical isolation between control signals and high-current actuators."
]
